# CacheEntry constructor

Represents a cached data entry with its storage timestamp. Used by [`ISwrStore`](../ISwrStore.md) implementations to track cache age.

```csharp
public CacheEntry(object? Data, DateTimeOffset StoredAt)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Data | The cached data object. |
| StoredAt | The UTC timestamp when this entry was stored. |
